title: galactia hoehnei
intro: Galactia hoehnei, also known as the Brazilian milkpea, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Galactia hoehnei include its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to alleviate muscle spasms and reduce pain. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and fever, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Galactia hoehnei can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
